title: lepidium montanum
intro: Lepidium montanum, also known as Mountain Pepper or Pepperwort, is a plant species in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) that is native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Lepidium montanum include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of Lepidium montanum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
